chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1816 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 6903/24 3.For hearing of main case 20-10-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Perusal of the Disability Certificate produced by the petitioner reflects that the same is not in accordance with the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, and has not been issued by the Medical Assessment Board constituted under the Rules framed thereunder. In view of the above, this petition along with the listed application is disposed of with directions to the petitioner to first approach the Medical Assessment Board constituted under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, for obtaining a fresh Disability Certificate and thereafter, he may approach the concerned respondents for redressal of his grievance, if so advised. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
